name: Boys And Girls Club Of Transylvania County
description: Boys And Girls Club Of Transylvania County is a place to play pickleball in Brevard, NC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Brevard Health and Racquet Club
description: Come play pickleball at Brevard Health and Racquet Club in Brevard, NC! There are 12 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, locker rooms, and trainers or lessons.

name: Connestee Falls
description: Connestee Falls is a place to play pickleball in Brevard, NC. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water. The courts are private.

name: Key Falls Inn
description: Come play pickleball at Key Falls Inn in Pisgah Forest, NC! There is 1 outdoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Mountain Falls Luxury Motorcoach Resort
description: Mountain Falls Luxury Motorcoach Resort is a place to play pickleball in Lake Toxaway, NC. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are private.

name: Sherwood Forest Private Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Sherwood Forest Private Courts in Brevard, NC! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Skyterra
description: Come play pickleball at Skyterra in Pisgah Forest, NC! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, trainers or lessons, and lights.

name: Transylvania Activity Center Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Transylvania Activity Center Gym in Brevard, NC! There are 5 asphalt courts. 4 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
